entities.name: MOUNTAIN AREAS
entities.description: High-altitude regions characterized by variable topography and climatic conditions

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: Essential resource provided by mountain areas to the global population

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: Benefits provided by mountain ecosystems to the global population

entities.name: TOPOGRAPHY
entities.description: Physical features of mountain areas, including variable altitudes

entities.name: CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Variable weather patterns characteristic of mountain areas

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of life stored in mountain reservoirs

entities.name: MOUNTAIN ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Fragile and rainfed environments found in mountain areas

entities.name: RAINFED
entities.description: Dependence on rainfall for water, characteristic of mountain ecosystems

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in climate that affect mountain systems

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting mountain systems

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: Lack of consistent access to enough food for an active, healthy life

entities.name: HARSH CONDITIONS OF THE TERRAIN
entities.description: Difficult physical environment in mountain regions

entities.name: POOR INFRASTRUCTURE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Lack of basic physical and organizational structures in mountain regions

entities.name: FSF
entities.description: A framework or concept to be popularized in mountain regions

entities.name: ZERO HUNGER
entities.description: The global goal of ending hunger and ensuring access to food

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The process of providing or obtaining the food necessary for health and growth

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Lack of proper nutrition caused by insufficient or poor quality food

entities.name: OBESITY
entities.description: A condition of excessive body fat often resulting from unhealthy diets

entities.name: UNHEALTHY DIETS
entities.description: Diets that contribute to malnutrition and obesity
